message:
fix(test262): Use absolute paths for edgebox runner and AOT file

The test262 runner was failing because:
1. edgebox binary was not in PATH
2. AOT file path was relative (didn't work when child process runs)

Fixed by using std.fs.cwd().realpathAlloc() to get absolute paths for:
- zig-out/bin/edgebox (runner binary)
- zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.aot (AOT module)

Also added aot-tool build target to build.zig for CI.
